know, it's like the first phase of any content program is you're, like, looking for indexing.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync on content, SEO, tracking, and pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/jH44tx8QSABz7rLsqYe6xRK71iZm7jr6?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GA4 drop aligns with site launch → likely migration/config (cookie consent) vs real traffic; hx primarily uses Plausible/Dreamdata but will fix/clean GA4](https://fathom.video/share/jH44tx8QSABz7rLsqYe6xRK71iZm7jr6?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Naming guidance unblocks pipeline → apply updates only to “In Review” items; do not change live Framer posts; avoid “decision intelligence platform”](https://fathom.video/share/jH44tx8QSABz7rLsqYe6xRK71iZm7jr6?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [PSEO moving forward → GrowthX to finalize taxonomy and generate 3 test LOB pages (aviation, cyber, property); hx to explore quick Framer container (minimal design) and/or dev support](https://fathom.video/share/jH44tx8QSABz7rLsqYe6xRK71iZm7jr6?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [New competitor comparisons prioritized → Mehmet to deliver Notion briefs by EOW; GrowthX to run these next week](https://fathom.video/share/jH44tx8QSABz7rLsqYe6xRK71iZm7jr6?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [GrowthX AI LLM visibility tracking tool demo planned for next week; 2026 goals session scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/jH44tx8QSABz7rLsqYe6xRK71iZm7jr6?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)

## Topics

### Analytics migration issue (GA4)

  - [Observed: steep GA4 drop on launch day → migration/config issue, not audience behavior](https://fathom.video/share/jH44tx8QSABz7rLsqYe6xRK71iZm7jr6?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Likely root cause → cookie consent configuration; first fix to try shared by GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/jH44tx8QSABz7rLsqYe6xRK71iZm7jr6?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Escalation path → add GrowthX to GTM for deeper inspection if needed](https://fathom.video/share/jH44tx8QSABz7rLsqYe6xRK71iZm7jr6?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Context → hx relies on Plausible/Dreamdata; GA4 events are outdated → clean/remove or fix events](https://fathom.video/share/jH44tx8QSABz7rLsqYe6xRK71iZm7jr6?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Forward view → align content tracking to conversion funnel for 2026 goals once GA4 baseline is stable](https://fathom.video/share/jH44tx8QSABz7rLsqYe6xRK71iZm7jr6?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)

### Publishing workflow and ops

  - [GrowthX can publish directly to Framer Staging with fields pre-filled → Frankie reviews then publishes](https://fathom.video/share/jH44tx8QSABz7rLsqYe6xRK71iZm7jr6?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Docs source-of-truth → Notion; Rachel will ensure artifacts are current before cross-checks](https://fathom.video/share/jH44tx8QSABz7rLsqYe6xRK71iZm7jr6?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Social/web agent context → David requested access parity across Notion/Git sources; GrowthX to confirm synced docs](https://fathom.video/share/jH44tx8QSABz7rLsqYe6xRK71iZm7jr6?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)

### Naming doc and universal updates

  - [Naming doc now in workspace Docs; Bailey tagged](https://fathom.video/share/jH44tx8QSABz7rLsqYe6xRK71iZm7jr6?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Scope → apply naming updates to “In Review” items in Notion only; do not edit live Framer posts](https://fathom.video/share/jH44tx8QSABz7rLsqYe6xRK71iZm7jr6?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Specific avoidance → “decision intelligence platform”; prefer “pricing and underwriting platform”](https://fathom.video/share/jH44tx8QSABz7rLsqYe6xRK71iZm7jr6?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Validation plan → GrowthX to fix the worst offenders first for quick spot-check, then roll to remaining](https://fathom.video/share/jH44tx8QSABz7rLsqYe6xRK71iZm7jr6?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Status check → “HX vs earnings” and “insurance pricing software” appear ready to stage; one active comment on “decision intelligence platform”](https://fathom.video/share/jH44tx8QSABz7rLsqYe6xRK71iZm7jr6?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)

### Competitor comparison content (incl. newer/smaller players)
